summary:
FXIFY Futures ranked 1st out of 12 futures prop firms we've tested firsthand, earning a score of 88/100. It offers three programs — Standard Plan, Expert Plan, and Straight to Sim Live Plan — with no time limits on evaluations. All accounts operate in a simulated trading environment designed to mirror futures market conditions.

Supported platforms include Tradovate, TradingView (via Tradovate), and NinjaTrader. Standard accounts pay 80% profit split, while Expert and Sim Live pay 90% by default, with a 100% split available via the add-on. Payout caps apply per account size.
pros: Three program types including Straight to Sim Live
Up to 100% profit split with add-on
bestFor: Serious futures traders who want multiple program options, established platform support, and transparent pricing on CME markets
notIdealFor: Traders who need Expert Advisor support or prefer immediate full profit withdrawal without payout caps

verdictBlocks.heading: Final Verdict on FXIFY Futures
verdictBlocks.body:
FXIFY Futures provides simulated futures trading programs with three options — Standard Plan, Expert Plan, and Straight to Sim Live Plan. All accounts operate in a simulated trading environment designed to mirror futures market conditions.

The Standard Plan offers a cost-effective entry from $89/month with 80% profit split (90% with add-on) and a $125 activation fee. The Expert Plan provides 90% split (100% with add-on), no activation fee, and higher position limits. The Straight to Sim Live Plan skips evaluation entirely for direct funded access at 90% split (100% with add-on).

Platform support includes Tradovate, TradingView (via Tradovate), and NinjaTrader. Payout caps apply per account size ($5K–$15K for Standard/Expert, $3K–$15K for Sim Live). Payouts are processed through Rise every 14 days. Expert Advisors are not permitted.

faq.q: What programs does FXIFY Futures offer?
faq.a: FXIFY Futures offers three programs: Standard Plan (one-step evaluation, 2% daily loss, 4% max loss, 80% split), Expert Plan (one-step evaluation, 3% daily loss, 4–5% max loss, 90% split), and Straight to Sim Live Plan (no evaluation, direct simulated funded account, 2.5% daily loss, 90% split). All can be upgraded to higher splits with the profit split add-on.
Yes, FXIFY Futures supports Tradovate, TradingView (via Tradovate), and NinjaTrader as trading platforms.

Yes, FXIFY Futures processes bi-weekly withdrawals through Rise, provided traders meet the buffer zone requirements and minimum payout thresholds ($100 for Standard/Expert, 3% of account balance for Sim Live). Payout caps apply per account size. Payouts can be withdrawn via bank transfer or cryptocurrency.

faq.q: How does FXIFY Futures payout work?
faq.a: Payouts can be requested every 14 days from the first funded trade. They are processed through Rise before withdrawal via bank transfer or cryptocurrency. Payout caps apply: Standard/Expert caps are $5K on $50K, $10K on $100K, $15K on $150K accounts. Sim Live caps are $3K, $6K, $12K, or $15K depending on account size. A buffer zone must be maintained, with Standard accounts able to withdraw 60% of profits within the buffer zone once, and Expert accounts 70%.

faq.q: Who is the founder of FXIFY?
faq.a: FXIFY was founded by a team of prop trading and brokerage professionals, though specific names have not been publicly disclosed. The firm is linked to FXPIG, a regulated forex broker, and has expanded to offer both CFD and futures trading through FXIFY Futures and FXIFY for CFD prop trading.
